title: com.para.civic.listCabildeos
summary: List query for indexed cabildeos with filters such as community, phase, and pagination.
constraints: Pagination and optional filters shape the list surface rather than returning raw records.
lifecycle: Used to populate the cabildeo list and community-scoped civic browse surfaces.
writers: Read-only query over indexed civic views.
indexing: Serves from indexed cabildeo view state rather than raw records.
moderation: Community filters can constrain visibility and browse context.

fields.name: cabildeos
fields.description: Indexed cabildeo view objects returned for the list surface.

fields.name: cursor
fields.description: Pagination cursor for incremental civic browsing.
